arabic:
وعن أبي هريرة رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ قال، قال رَسُول اللَّهِ ﷺ: 
"ما من قوم يقومون من مجلس ولا يذكرون اللَّه تعالى فيه إلا قاموا عن مثل جيفة حمار وكان لهم حسرة" ((رَوَاهُ أبُو دَاوُدَ بإسناد صحيح)).

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Those people who leave a gathering in which they have not remembered Allah, will conclude it as if it has foul odour similar to that of a rotten carcass of a donkey. And it will be a cause of grief to them.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Etiquette of Sleeping, Lying and Sitting etc
